using BlazorWebFormsComponents.Identity;
// Auto-generated API-compatible stub. Original referenced legacy Web Forms APIs.
// TODO(bwfc-general): Rebuild method bodies using ASP.NET Core equivalents.

namespace WingtipToys.Models;

public partial class ApplicationUser
{
    public ClaimsIdentity GenerateUserIdentity(ApplicationUserManager manager) => throw new NotImplementedException();
    public Task<ClaimsIdentity> GenerateUserIdentityAsync(ApplicationUserManager manager) => throw new NotImplementedException();
}

public partial class ApplicationDbContext
{
    public static ApplicationDbContext Create() => throw new NotImplementedException();
}

public static partial class IdentityHelper
{
    public const string XsrfKey = "XsrfId";
    public const string ProviderNameKey = "providerName";
    public const string CodeKey = "code";
    public const string UserIdKey = "userId";

    public static void SignIn(ApplicationUserManager manager, ApplicationUser user, bool isPersistent) { }
    public static string GetProviderNameFromRequest(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest request) => throw new NotImplementedException();
    public static string GetCodeFromRequest(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest request) => throw new NotImplementedException();
    public static string GetUserIdFromRequest(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest request) => throw new NotImplementedException();
    public static string GetResetPasswordRedirectUrl(string code, Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest request) => throw new NotImplementedException();
    public static string GetUserConfirmationRedirectUrl(string code, string userId, Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest request) => throw new NotImplementedException();
    public static void RedirectToReturnUrl(string returnUrl, HttpResponse response) { }
}
